title: CER Evidence Depth Classification
description: Unified evidence depth taxonomy shared between CER Review and CER Authoring pipelines. Aligned with cer_review_assist_sandbox_v2_0 evidence_depth_policy.

evidence_depth.description: Depth of evidence relative to original source document

evidence_confidence.description: Confidence classification of the evidence chain

severity_cap.description: Maximum allowable severity for this evidence depth

source_anchor.description: Path or reference to the primary source document

verbatim_excerpt.description: Required for PRIMARY_VERBATIM — exact text from source

verification_note.description: For SECONDARY_SUMMARY: 'Verify against primary source at [path]'
